item.title: Welcome to the Ocean Dump - II
item.description:
Turn on wifi. Don't know if sound is good or bad. Sorry, credit isn't given, I'm just trying to compile all of these videos/images I've found into one spot. Done this once before you can go here to see the first dump: https://imgur.com/gallery/ocean-is-huge-terrifying-i-love-YZAirur. Enjoy the wonders of the deep blue sea!
Planning a cage dive for later next year. Can't wait to get close to a great white in person!
item.dc:creator: Dippstix90

item.title: The world sucks dump
item.dc:creator: MrAngryEyes

item.title: The 486th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - DOGS!!! Edition #21
item.description:
I'M BACK! Imgur has been not wanting to allow me to upload dumps lately. I think it is racist against dogs.
He doesn't need handsome pills! Look at him!
FALCOOOOOOOOOORRRRRR!!!!!
The best goalie
*nibble*
AAAWWWWwwwwwwwOOOOOOOOooooooo!
Pet Me!
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever I post or one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. This week I'm raising awareness for a Wild Life Hospital in England, the Lower Moss Wood Nature Reserve. They are in desperate need of funds to keep their doors open and keep educating the public. Here is a link to their Imgur Post about it, with a Go Fund Me link at the bottom. https://imgur.com/gallery/please-help-us-1097nGc They'll be closing at the end of January if they can't raise enough money.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq -----FRESHLY UPDATED----- #MemeDump #Puppers #Doggos #PuppersAndDoggos #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: Gave Elf On A Shelf A Try.
item.dc:creator: jeffmadams

item.title: Deep water scientists film rare sighting
item.description: Most squid lay their eggs on the seafloor and don’t provide any parental care. The black-eyed squid (Gonatus onyx) is one of the few species that brood their eggs. Source: Schmidt Ocean Institute
item.dc:creator: NoahTheMask

item.title: Yesterday was 1000 days clean/sober.
item.description: I found out recently that March 6th, 2022 was my respawn point. Thought it was the 7th of that month the whole time... I'm recovering but I'm still pretty stupid lmao.

item.title: This day in History: December 2nd, 1859, Abolitionist John Brown is hanged in Charles Town (now West Virginia) for leading a raid on the United States Armory and Arsenal at Harper's Ferry
item.description:

item.title: So... Im a BlueSky-er now?
item.description:
About 6 years back I made an official CCPA, and other types, requests to Facebook, Meta, Instagram, and Snapchat to completely delete all information about me and to delete my accounts. From seeing all this Twitter (X) dumpster fires, I decided to join in the mass exodus (even though I never used Twitter in the first place) and joined BlueSky just to show my support. I don't want to add any real life friends as my online privacy is important to me. I don't care enough about any 1 celebrity or influencer to 'follow' them. I get my memes from Imgur. I get my news from Ground News. ...So what do I do now? This means I'm cool now, right? Is my virture signaling showing(sarcasm)? I'm helping!
This is how I feel
item.dc:creator: TheSteakBoyHimself

item.title: Forever missing my sweet boy.
item.description: It’s not an anniversary of his loss or anything. It’s just another day of missing him and feeling the most profound longing for which I have no words to adequately describe. He’s been gone for a year and three months tomorrow. It feels like both a decade and a day he’s been gone. I guess that’s one of the many crazy ways grief works. It bends time. It works its way into your bones, your dna, everything that you are. I think a lot about how I’ll feel this for the rest of my days. I’ll miss him for the rest of my life. But I guess if I’m the one that has to carry the burden of missing him, I’ll take that over having left him behind. But there are many days I feel that I died with him, and just as many that I kind of wish I had. I wouldn’t wish this hurt on anyone, but some days I wish more folks could grasp the weight of loss and hold just a little more space for grief. If you’re longing for a lost love, I’ll hold space for you. And I see you. I made this video not long after he died. I always sang the first verse to him, but could never sing the second verse, because I never wanted that to be true. But it is true now, and while finding him in me dreams is a blessing, I wake with lead in my chest and stomach when reality sets back in and I don’t find him in bed with me. I miss you and love you, forever and always, my sweet boy. I’m just throwing this into the ether because I’m really, really sad today and I needed to put it all somewhere.
item.dc:creator: AtlasHuggedrescuepup
